case_title: JOHN MURRAY PRODUCTIONS, INC VS. ROBERT W FOUNTAIN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-22-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-17-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN DEFAULT(S) JUDGMENT AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN MURRAY PRODUCTIONS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT FOUNTAIN, ROBERT W IND.AND DBA ROBERT FOUNTAIN DESIGNS DOES 1-20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-22-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-07-2002
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN MURRAY PRODUCTIONS, INC SERVED SEP-19-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOUNTAIN, ROBERT W IND.AND DBA ROBERT FOUNTAIN DESIGNS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-17-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN MURRAY PRODUCTIONS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT FOUNTAIN, ROBERT W IND.AND DBA ROBERT FOUNTAIN DESIGNS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $138.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $2,500.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FOUNTAIN, ROBERT W IND.AND DBA ROBERT FOUNTAIN DESIGNS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN MURRAY PRODUCTIONS, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOUNTAIN, ROBERT W IND.AND DBA ROBERT FOUNTAIN DESIGNS $2,814.00 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $138.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,612.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN MURRAY PRODUCTIONS, INC
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN MURRAY PRODUCTIONS, INC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,654.45 AS TO DEFENDANT FOUNTAIN, ROBERT W IND.AND DBA ROBERT FOUNTAIN DESIGNS
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FOUNTAIN, ROBERT W IND.AND DBA ROBERT FOUNTAIN DESIGNS
